    let expect_node = ExpectNode::Node{ 
        metadata: ExpectMetadata(
            NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::input, offset: 0, len: 10, is_leaf: false }, 
            NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 0, node_type: NodeType::Node, recovery: None, char_offset: 0, char_len: 10 },
        ), 
        children: vec![
            ExpectNode::Node{
                metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                    NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::ecmd, offset: 0, len: 10, is_leaf: false }, 
                    NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 0, node_type: NodeType::Node, recovery: None, char_offset: 0, char_len: 10 },
                ), 
                children: vec![
                    ExpectNode::Node{
                        metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                            NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::cmdx, offset: 0, len: 9, is_leaf: false }, 
                            NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 0, node_type: NodeType::Node, recovery: None, char_offset: 0, char_len: 9 },
                        ),
                        children: vec![
                            ExpectNode::Node{
                                metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                                    NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::cmd, offset: 0, len: 9, is_leaf: false }, 
                                    NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 0, node_type: NodeType::Node, recovery: None, char_offset: 0, char_len: 9 },
                                ),
                                children: vec![
                                    ExpectNode::Node{
                                        metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                                            NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::select, offset: 0, len: 9, is_leaf: false }, 
                                            NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 0, node_type: NodeType::Node, recovery: None, char_offset: 0, char_len: 9 },
                                        ),
                                        children: vec![
                                            ExpectNode::Node{
                                                metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                                                    NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::selectnowith, offset: 0, len: 9, is_leaf: false }, 
                                                    NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 0, node_type: NodeType::Node, recovery: None, char_offset: 0, char_len: 9 },
                                                ),
                                                children: vec![
                                                    ExpectNode::Node{
                                                        metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                                                            NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::oneselect, offset: 0, len: 9, is_leaf: false }, 
                                                            NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 0, node_type: NodeType::Node, recovery: None, char_offset: 0, char_len: 9 },
                                                        ),
                                                        children: vec![
                                                            ExpectNode::TokenSet{
                                                                metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                                                                    NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::SELECT, offset: 0, len: 7, is_leaf: false }, 
                                                                    NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 0, node_type: NodeType::TokenSet, recovery: None, char_offset: 0, char_len: 7 },
                                                                ),
                                                                leading: vec![],
                                                                token: Box::new(ExpectNode::TokenItem {
                                                                    metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                                                                        NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::SELECT, offset: 0, len: 6, is_leaf: true }, 
                                                                        NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 0, node_type: NodeType::TokenItem, recovery: None, char_offset: 0, char_len: 6 },
                                                                    ),
                                                                    value: "SELECT".into(),
                                                                }),
                                                                trailing: vec![
                                                                    ExpectNode::TokenItem { 
                                                                        metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                                                                            NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::SPACE, offset: 6, len: 1, is_leaf: true }, 
                                                                            NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 0, node_type: NodeType::TrailingToken, recovery: None, char_offset: 6, char_len: 1 },
                                                                        ),
                                                                        value: " ".into()
                                                                    }
                                                                ], 
                                                            },
                                                            ExpectNode::Node{
                                                                metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                                                                    NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::selcollist, offset: 7, len: 2, is_leaf: false }, 
                                                                    NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 71, node_type: NodeType::Node, recovery: None, char_offset: 7, char_len: 2 },
                                                                ),
                                                                children: vec![
                                                                    ExpectNode::Node{
                                                                        metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                                                                            NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::expr, offset: 7, len: 2, is_leaf: false }, 
                                                                            NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 238, node_type: NodeType::Node, recovery: None, char_offset: 7, char_len: 2 },
                                                                        ),
                                                                        children: vec![
                                                                            ExpectNode::Node{
                                                                                metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                                                                                    NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::term, offset: 7, len: 2, is_leaf: false }, 
                                                                                    NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 238, node_type: NodeType::Node, recovery: None, char_offset: 7, char_len: 2 },
                                                                                ),
                                                                                children: vec![
                                                                                    ExpectNode::TokenSet{
                                                                                        metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                                                                                            NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::INTEGER, offset: 7, len: 2, is_leaf: false }, 
                                                                                            NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 238, node_type: NodeType::TokenSet, recovery: None, char_offset: 7, char_len: 2 },
                                                                                        ),
                                                                                        leading: vec![],
                                                                                        token: Box::new(ExpectNode::TokenItem {
                                                                                            metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                                                                                                NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::INTEGER, offset: 7, len: 2, is_leaf: true }, 
                                                                                                NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 238, node_type: NodeType::TokenItem, recovery: None, char_offset: 7, char_len: 2 },
                                                                                            ),
                                                                                            value: "42".into()
                                                                                        }),
                                                                                        trailing: vec![],
                                                                                    }
                                                                                ],
                                                                            }                                                                    
                                                                        ],
                                                                    }                                                                    
                                                                ],
                                                            }
                                                        ], 
                                                    },                                                    
                                                ], 
                                            },                                            
                                        ], 
                                    },                                    
                                ], 
                            },                            
                        ], 
                    },
                    ExpectNode::TokenSet{
                        metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                            NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::SEMI, offset: 9, len: 1, is_leaf: false }, 
                            NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 23, node_type: NodeType::TokenSet, recovery: None, char_offset: 9, char_len: 1 },
                        ), 
                        leading: vec![],
                        token: Box::new(ExpectNode::TokenItem { 
                            metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                                NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::SEMI, offset: 9, len: 1, is_leaf: true }, 
                                NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 23, node_type: NodeType::TokenItem, recovery: None, char_offset: 9, char_len: 1 },
                            ), 
                            value: ";".into(

                            )
                        }),
                        trailing: vec![],
                    },
                ]
            },
            ExpectNode::Node{
                metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                    NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::ecmd, offset: 10, len: 0, is_leaf: false }, 
                    NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 0, node_type: NodeType::Node, recovery: None, char_offset: 10, char_len: 0 },
                ), 
                children: vec![
                    ExpectNode::TokenSet { 
                        metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                            NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::EOF, offset: 10, len: 0, is_leaf: false }, 
                            NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 0, node_type: NodeType::TokenSet, recovery: None, char_offset: 10, char_len: 0 },
                        ),
                        leading: vec![],
                        token: Box::new(ExpectNode::TokenItem { 
                            metadata: ExpectMetadata(
                                NodeMetadataKey{ kind: syntax_kind::EOF, offset: 10, len: 0, is_leaf: true }, 
                                NodeMetadata{ edit_state: 0, node_type: NodeType::TokenItem, recovery: None, char_offset: 10, char_len: 0 },
                            ),
                            value: "".into()
                        }),
                        trailing: vec![],
                    }
                ]
            }
        ],
    };
